name: esm_kafka_troubleshoot
description: Troubleshoot Kafka streaming issues and connectivity problems. Diagnoses MSK cluster connectivity, Lambda function timeouts, authentication failures, and network configuration issues. Provides step-by-step resolution guidance for Kafka and Lambda integration problems.

kafka_type.description: Type of Kafka cluster: "msk" for Amazon MSK, "self-managed" for self-managed Apache Kafka, "auto-detect" to determine automatically
kafka_type.title: Kafka Type

issue_type.description: Type of troubleshooting: "diagnosis" for identifying issues, or specific issue type for resolution steps
issue_type.title: Issue Type
